title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 15 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 15 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 15 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 15/01/2026
Today, Dalian iron ore futures trended weakly with noticeable volatility. The benchmark contract I2605 ultimately closedat 813 RMB/tonne, representing a decline of 1.03% from the previous trading day. In the physical market, prices dipped slightly by approximately 2-5 RMB/tonne.
